title: Cryptographic Hash Function
scenario: Design a cryptographic hash function that takes a string input and produces a 256-bit output. The hash function should be deterministic, non-invertible, and resistant to collisions. Use the SHA-256 algorithm as a starting point and modify it to meet the requirements.
constraints: The code should be written in a standard programming language (e.g. Python, Java).
The hash function should use a secure pseudo-random number generator.

evaluationCriteria.description: The output meets all constraints specified in the prompt.
The hash function is secure and resistant to collisions.
The code is well-structured, readable, and free of errors.
